---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or producing wrong results
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `...`
2. With input `...`
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What should happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happens. Include error output, stack traces, or screenshots.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14]
- Python version: `python3 --version`
- Branch/commit: `git rev-parse HEAD`
- Docker: `docker --version` (if using Docker)

## Related Area

- [ ] Python tools (`tools/`)
- [ ] Agent prompts (`orchestrator/`, `subagents/`, etc.)
- [ ] LaTeX templates (`templates/`)
- [ ] CI/Docker (`docker-compose.yml`, `.github/`)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other
